title: Segfault in moveToRoot
description:
yongheng added on 2020-06-07 03:01:48:
POC:
---
CREATE TABLE v0 ( v1 INTEGER PRIMARY KEY ) ; INSERT INTO v0 VALUES ( 99 ) ; SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT count ( * ) OVER( ) FROM v0 ORDER BY sum ( v1 ) OVER( ) ) ;

drh added on 2020-06-08 11:38:56:
The changes that caused this problem are no longer on trunk.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE v1 ( v2 INT PRIMARY KEY, v3 VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, v4 FLOAT DEFAULT 0.0 );
INSERT INTO v1 (v2, v3) VALUES (1, 'test'), (2, 'example'), (3, NULL);
CREATE TABLE v5 ( v6 INT, v7 INT, v8 INT DEFAULT 0 );
INSERT INTO v5 (v6, v7) VALUES (10, 20), (NULL, 30), (40, NULL);
SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM v1 JOIN v5 ON v1.v2 = v5.v6 );
key_bug_features: SELECT EXISTS with ORDER BY sum in window function
